questions.question: Explain the key difference between an ID3 and C4.5 decision tree learning algorithm.
What is the purpose of a pruning technique in a decision tree learning model?
questions.hint: Optional hint: Pruning helps prevent overfitting by removing redundant or unnecessary nodes from the tree.

questions.question: What is the primary disadvantage of decision tree learning models when dealing with high-dimensional data?
questions.hint: Optional hint: One of the primary disadvantages is the increased risk of overfitting due to the curse of dimensionality.
